Section Title: ... > ### About DSP World Gold Mining Overseas Equity Omni FoF Direct Growth
Content:
DSP World Gold Mining Overseas Equity Omni FoF Direct Growth is a Equity Mutual Fund Scheme launched by DSP Mutual Fund. This scheme was made available to investors on 16 Dec 1996. Kaivalya Nadkarni is the Current Fund Manager of DSP World Gold Mining Overseas Equity Omni FoF Direct Growth fund. The fund currently has an Asset Under Management(AUM) of ₹2,30,322 Cr and the Latest NAV as of 25 Mar 2026 is ₹59.64.
The DSP World Gold Mining Overseas Equity Omni FoF Direct Growth is rated Very High risk. Minimum SIP Investment is set to ₹100. ;
 ...
